channel.title: restic on cheo.dev
channel.description: Recent content in restic on cheo.dev

item.title: Automated Testing of Restic Backups
item.description: My NAS server runs daily backups to an onsite USB hard drive and an offsite Backblaze B2 bucket with restic and autorestic. This backup plan aims to fulfil the 3,2,1 rule by being automatic, redundant and offsite. However, a backup is only as good as its ability to be restored successfully. It can be potentially disastrous if we tried to restore a backup after data loss and realise that the data has been unknowningly corrupted or loss during the backup process.
